orders_help: ↑↓: navigate  D: cancel order  A: cancel all
tooltip_language:
UI display language.
Changes take effect immediately.
tooltip_priv_key:
Your Ethereum wallet hex key (no 0x prefix).
Used for EIP-712 order signing
and wallet address derivation.
tooltip_api_key:
Polymarket CLOB API key.
Get it via POST /auth/api-key
or in the dashboard.
tooltip_api_secret:
Secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing
of each CLOB API request (L2 auth).
tooltip_passphrase:
Passphrase for L2 authentication.
Sent in POLY_PASSPHRASE header.
tooltip_chain_id:
Blockchain ID.
137  = Polygon Mainnet (production)
80002 = Amoy Testnet (testing)
tooltip_timeout:
HTTP request timeout in seconds.
Recommended: 10–30.
tooltip_max_retries:
Maximum retry attempts
for failed HTTP requests.
Recommended: 3.
tooltip_monitor_enabled:
Enable market monitoring via Gamma API.
Generates alerts when rules match.
tooltip_monitor_poll:
Gamma API polling interval in ms.
Recommended: 1000–5000.
tooltip_trades_enabled:
Enable TradesMonitor — track
orders, trades and positions.
Requires L2 auth (api_key/secret/passphrase).
tooltip_trades_poll:
CLOB/Data API polling interval in ms.
Recommended: 5000.
tooltip_alert_on_fill: Send notification when order is filled.
tooltip_alert_on_cancel: Send notification when order is cancelled.
tooltip_trades_limit:
Maximum trades per API request.
Recommended: 50.
tooltip_max_position:
Maximum single position size in USD.
Example: 50.00
tooltip_neg_risk:
Use NegRisk contract
(0xC5d563A36AE78145C45a50134d48A1215220f80a)
instead of standard CTF Exchange.
tooltip_copy_enabled:
Enable copy trading.
Requires L2 auth + private_key + database.
tooltip_size_mode:
Position size calculation method:
proportional — proportional to trader's balance
fixed_pct    — fixed % of our balance
tooltip_chat_id:
Chat or channel ID for notifications.
Number or @channel_username.
tooltip_admin_chat_id: Telegram user ID of the admin. Admin can control the bot and edit all settings including secrets.
tooltip_db_enabled:
Enable SQLite database.
Required for copy trading.
tooltip_db_path:
Path to SQLite database file.
Example: ./polytrade.db
tooltip_log_level:
Log verbosity level:
trace → maximum detail
error → critical errors only
tooltip_log_format:
Log output format:
pretty — colored, human-readable
json   — structured (for ELK/Loki)
wizard_step1_hint:
Your Ethereum wallet hex key (no 0x prefix).
Used for EIP-712 order signing and address derivation.
wizard_step2_hint:
Polymarket CLOB API key.
Get it via POST /auth/api-key or in the dashboard.
log_trades_monitor_skip: trades monitor requires L2 credentials, skipping
log_copytrading_skip_l2: copytrading requires L2 credentials and private_key, skipping
log_bot_running: bot running. Press Ctrl+C to stop.
